name: DiversiFi Guardian
tagline: FX-risk intelligence and autonomous protection for businesses that earn in one currency and must purchase in another.
description: DiversiFi is an FX-risk intelligence and autonomous protection layer. The Guardian app is the reference consumer: it detects a visitor's country/currency, surfaces their real FX risk, lets them choose a values-aligned protection philosophy, and auto-executes within user-signed permission bounds. The business layer is the north star: per-purchase-cycle FX drag quantification for SME importers/traders, with every decision recorded on the chain-aware RecommendationLedger and anchored to 0G Storage. The philosophy/values system (Africapitalism, Buen Vivir, Confucian, Gotong Royong, Islamic Finance, Pan-Caribbean, Global Diversification, and Custom) is the structural moat that drives identity-based retention.
author: thisyearnofear

capabilities.name: FX-Risk Intelligence
capabilities.description: Quantifies currency drag per purchase cycle for SMEs and surfaces a real-time, country-specific risk moment for retail users.

capabilities.name: Autonomous Protection
capabilities.description: The Guardian loop monitors macro/FX/inflation signals and auto-executes rebalancing within user-signed ERC-7715-style permission bounds.

capabilities.name: Verifiable AI
capabilities.description: Every recommendation is recorded on the chain-aware RecommendationLedger and anchored to 0G Storage, producing an auditable proof trail.

capabilities.name: Philosophy / Values System
capabilities.description: Identity-based protection strategies that shape asset filtering, AI prompts, and scoring — including Africapitalism, Buen Vivir, Islamic Finance, Confucian, Gotong Royong, Pan-Caribbean, Global Diversification, and Custom.

capabilities.name: Chain-Aware Routing
capabilities.description: Routes savings to Celo/Mento (local stablecoins), yield to Arbitrum (deep liquidity / RWA), and APAC savings to HashKey Chain.

capabilities.name: Best-Yield Engine
capabilities.description: Personalized vault recommendations via vaults.fyi and GMX GM-pool deposits on Arbitrum.

capabilities.name: Enterprise Gateway
capabilities.description: API-key authenticated audit export and x402 marketplace for rails players and B2B licensing.
